user.title: Add SwitchBot Cover
user.description: Configure a roller shutter controlled by two SwitchBot switches (up/down) with an optional contact sensor for state feedback.

data_description.up_switch: SwitchBot switch entity that opens the shutter
data_description.down_switch: SwitchBot switch entity that closes the shutter
data_description.sensor: Binary sensor that detects shutter position (on = open, off = closed)
data_description.movement_timeout: Seconds to wait for movement to complete before releasing lock

error.same_switch: Up and down switches must be different entities
